src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Co.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and JDK 21.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Co.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Po.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Po.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3 / JDK 21 stack).

src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Us.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from the legacy javax.validation package to the Jakarta EE namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Us.why_exists: The javax.validation package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist' on JDK 21/Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+ annotations; using javax causes compile errors or missing class runtime failures.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update JJWT library usage from v0.11.x API to v0.12.x API, replacing deprecated builder methods with new fluent API.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: JJWT 0.12.x removed old builder methods like setClaims, setSubject, signWith(SignatureAlgorithm), and parserBuilder; using old API causes compile errors due to missing methods.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update JJWT library usage from v0.11.x API to v0.12.x API for adding claims.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: JJWT 0.12.x removed put method on Claims; using old API causes compile errors due to missing methods.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update JJWT library usage from v0.11.x API to v0.12.x API for building claims.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: JJWT 0.12.x requires explicit build() call on ClaimsBuilder; using old API causes compile errors or runtime issues.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update JJWT library usage from v0.11.x API to v0.12.x API for token building and signing.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: JJWT 0.12.x removed setClaims, setIssuedAt, setExpiration, and signWith(SignatureAlgorithm); using old API causes compile errors due to missing methods.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update JJWT library usage from v0.11.x API to v0.12.x API for token parsing.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: JJWT 0.12.x removed parserBuilder and parseClaimsJws; using old API causes compile errors due to missing methods.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update JJWT library usage from v0.11.x API to v0.12.x API for token validation parsing.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: JJWT 0.12.x removed parserBuilder and parseClaimsJws; using old API causes compile errors due to missing methods.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update JJWT library usage from v0.11.x API to v0.12.x API for accessing parsed claims payload.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: JJWT 0.12.x renamed getBody() to getPayload() on Jws; using old API causes compile errors due to missing methods.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/RestE.general_idea: Migrate from manual WebFlux exception handling to Spring MVC-style ResponseEntityExceptionHandler using ProblemDetail.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/RestE.why_exists: The class previously implemented WebExceptionHandler (WebFlux) and manually wrote bytes to the response; the new code extends ResponseEntityExceptionHandler (Spring MVC/Servlet stack) and returns ProblemDetail objects, which is incompatible with the old reactive signature and requires the new Spring Boot 3.x error handling mechanism.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/RestE.before: public class RestExceptionHandler implements WebExceptionHandler { ... public Mono<Void> handle(ServerWebExchange exchange, Throwable ex) { ... } }
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/RestE.after: public class RestExceptionHandler extends ResponseEntityExceptionHandler { ... @ExceptionHandler(PostNotFoundException.class) public ProblemDetail handlePostNotFoundException(PostNotFoundException ex) { ... } }
